title: pelargonium × colleyanum
intro: Pelargonium × colleyanum, also known as Mountain Rose or Colvillea rose, is a hybrid plant species in the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and pink flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to its high content of volatile oils, particularly geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × colleyanum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in African and European folk remedies.
